modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty live streaming to Facebook Live or YouTube using OBS.

full_description_text: User is attempting to set up a live stream to Facebook Live or YouTube. They are using Open Broadcaster Software (OBS) for the streaming process. The user is unsure of the steps required to successfully initiate the live stream. There is a need for clarification on the procedure involved.
short_description: Difficulty live streaming to Facebook Live or YouTube using OBS.
description: User is attempting to set up a live stream to Facebook Live or YouTube. They are using Open Broadcaster Software (OBS) for the streaming process. The user is unsure of the steps required to successfully initiate the live stream. There is a need for clarification on the procedure involved.
